task: unquote_header_value in utils.py has accumulated years of comments and special-casing. Clean up the function body.
correctness_argument: The cleanup removes only the verbose comments while keeping the UNC-path guard (`if not is_filename or value[:2] != "\\\\":`). The backslash replacements are therefore never applied to UNC filenames, preserving the fix for #458 and keeping `is_filename` meaningful.
